title: Student and Staff Computing Devices
bid_summary: Dallas ISD is seeking vendors to provide student and staff computing devices, including laptops, Chromebooks, and monitors. The district is looking for devices that meet specific requirements, such as USB 3.1 ports and a minimum one-year warranty. Vendors must submit their proposals, including pricing and specifications, by the designated deadline. The district anticipates awarding the contract at the August board meeting and expects vendors to deliver devices starting in September 2024.
product_specification: enrollment in Google Management for Chromebooks

bid_summary: The Dallas Independent School District is soliciting proposals for student and staff computing devices, including laptops, desktops, tablet devices, and display monitors. The district is seeking vendors who can provide devices that meet the minimum hardware requirements specified in the RFP. The contract will be for a three-year term with two one-year extensions. The district reserves the right to award contracts to a single vendor or multiple vendors.

title: Student and Staff Computing Devices **SOURCING #168884**
bid_summary: The Dallas Independent School District is seeking proposals for student and staff computing devices, including laptops, desktops, tablet devices, and display monitors. The district reserves the right to award contracts to a single vendor or multiple vendors. The specifications listed in this RFP are the minimum hardware requirements for each tier of device required by Dallas ISD.

bid_summary: This document outlines the requirements and affirmations for a business to participate in a procurement contract with the State of Maryland. The business must comply with various laws and regulations, including those related to financial disclosure, political contribution disclosure, and maintaining a drug and alcohol-free workplace. The contract is conditional upon compliance with these requirements, and violation may result in termination or suspension of the contract. The business must also provide certain documentation and affirmations, including a proposal affidavit and a contract affidavit.

title: Dell Laptops w/Extended Warranty
bid_summary: The State of Maryland Treasurer's Office is seeking bids for Dell laptops with extended warranty. The laptops must be Microsoft Copilot ready. The bid includes Dell Latitude 5550 laptops and Dell Thunderbolt 4 Dock.

bid_summary: The Dell Latitude 5550 is a laptop with an Intel Core Ultra 5 125U processor, Windows 11 Pro, and a 15.6 inch FHD display. The laptop also features a backlit keyboard, Wi-Fi 6E, and a 3-cell battery. The quote includes various configuration options and additional software. The payment terms are based on estimates, with the final amounts stated on the relevant invoice.

bid_summary: The document is an affidavit for mercury content information, requiring the authorized representative to affirm the presence or absence of mercury in the product. The affidavit must be furnished to the procurement officer and may be distributed to various government units. The document is subject to applicable laws of the United States and the State of Maryland.

title: Hardware Master Contract
payment_terms: Invoice(s) shall be submitted within 10 days of delivering the equipment
additional_documentation: Letter of Authorization (LOA) from the Manufacturer or Distributor
Proof of delivery including packing slip or delivery confirmation, and equipment serial numbers
bid_summary: The State of Maryland is seeking bids for a Hardware Master Contract to provide laptops and associated peripherals. The contract will be awarded to one vendor for both Functional Area requirements. The agency intends to make an award based on the most advantageous proposal, considering price and evaluation factors. The selected Master Contractor will be required to provide a Letter of Authorization from the Manufacturer or Distributor, a Mercury Affidavit, and proof of delivery.
product_specification: Dell Limited Hardware Warranty Extended for all machines purchased - 3 Years
